# services.avahi

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.avahi`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.avahi.allowInterfaces` | `null or (list of string)` | List of network interfaces that should be used by the {command}`avahi-daemon`. Other interfaces will be ignored. If `null`, all local interfaces except loopback and point-to-point will be used. |
| `services.avahi.allowPointToPoint` | `boolean` | Whether to use POINTTOPOINT interfaces. Might make mDNS unreliable due to usually large latencies with such links and opens a potential security hole by allowing mDNS access from Internet connections. |
| `services.avahi.browseDomains` | `list of string` | List of non-local DNS domains to be browsed. |
| `services.avahi.cacheEntriesMax` | `null or signed integer` | Number of resource records to be cached per interface. Use 0 to disable caching. Avahi daemon defaults to 4096 if not set. |
| `services.avahi.debug` | `boolean` | Whether to enable debug logging. |
| `services.avahi.denyInterfaces` | `null or (list of string)` | List of network interfaces that should be ignored by the {command}`avahi-daemon`. Other unspecified interfaces will be used, unless {option}`allowInterfaces` is set. This option takes precedence over {option}`allowInterfaces`. |
| `services.avahi.domainName` | `string` | Domain name for all advertisements. |
| `services.avahi.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to run the Avahi daemon, which allows Avahi clients to use Avahi's service discovery facilities and also allows the local machine to advertise its presence and services (through the mDNS responder implemented by `avahi-daemon`). |
| `services.avahi.extraConfig` | `strings concatenated with "\n"` | Extra config to append to avahi-daemon.conf. |
| `services.avahi.extraServiceFiles` | `attribute set of (string or absolute path)` | Specify custom service definitions which are placed in the avahi service directory. See the {manpage}`avahi.service(5)` manpage for detailed information. |
| `services.avahi.hostName` | `string` | Host name advertised on the LAN. If not set, avahi will use the value of {option}`config.networking.hostName`. |
| `services.avahi.ipv4` | `boolean` | Whether to use IPv4. |
| `services.avahi.ipv6` | `boolean` | Whether to use IPv6. |
| `services.avahi.nssmdns4` | `boolean` | Whether to enable the mDNS NSS (Name Service Switch) plug-in for IPv4. Enabling it allows applications to resolve names in the `.local` domain by transparently querying the Avahi daemon. |
| `services.avahi.nssmdns6` | `boolean` | Whether to enable the mDNS NSS (Name Service Switch) plug-in for IPv6. Enabling it allows applications to resolve names in the `.local` domain by transparently querying the Avahi daemon. ::: {.note} Due to the fact that most mDNS responders only register local IPv4 addresses, most user want to leave this option disabled to avoid long timeouts when applications first resolve the none existing IPv6 address. ::: |
| `services.avahi.openFirewall` | `boolean` | Whether to open the firewall for UDP port 5353. Disabling this setting also disables discovering of network devices. |
| `services.avahi.package` | `package` | The avahi package to use. |
| `services.avahi.publish.addresses` | `boolean` | Whether to register mDNS address records for all local IP addresses. |
| `services.avahi.publish.domain` | `boolean` | Whether to announce the locally used domain name for browsing by other hosts. |
| `services.avahi.publish.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to allow publishing in general. |
| `services.avahi.publish.hinfo` | `boolean` | Whether to register a mDNS HINFO record which contains information about the local operating system and CPU. |
| `services.avahi.publish.userServices` | `boolean` | Whether to publish user services. Will set `addresses=true`. |
| `services.avahi.publish.workstation` | `boolean` | Whether to register a service of type "\_workstation.\_tcp" on the local LAN. |
| `services.avahi.reflector` | `boolean` | Reflect incoming mDNS requests to all allowed network interfaces. |
| `services.avahi.wideArea` | `boolean` | Whether to enable wide-area service discovery. It is recommended to keep this options disabled as it exposes the system to `CVE-2024-52615`/`GHSA-x6vp-f33h-h32g`. |
